footer.tagline: Fresh US auction lots, transparent pricing, and real-time VIN tracking.

home.title: Buy smart. Import confidently.
home.subtitle: Browse fresh lots from US auctions. Filter by make, price, and year — then leave a request and we’ll handle delivery and paperwork.
home.priceRule: Price is shown as Buy It Now. If it's missing — we show 50% of Estimated Retail Value. If both are missing — “Price on request”.
home.steps: 1) Find a lot → 2) Send a request → 3) We confirm costs, timing and docs → 4) Delivery & handover.
home.faq: Have questions about a lot or its price? Write to us — we respond quickly in Georgian, Russian, and English.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Full-cycle support: delivery from US auctions, customs clearance, and vehicle handover in Georgia.
services.ctaText: Leave a request — we’ll clarify timelines, cost and required documents.

customs.title: Car Customs Clearance from USA in Georgia
customs.subtitle: We handle the entire customs process — from paperwork to license plates.
customs.intro: Customs clearance in Georgia involves several steps: VIN inspection, duty calculation based on engine size and model year, and filing the declaration. We guide you through every stage so you receive your car with a complete document package and no unnecessary delays.
steps: Obtaining a Georgian TIN (if needed) — issued at the tax office within minutes
Vehicle inspection — an officer verifies the VIN, specs and document match
Preparing and filing the customs declaration — Title, Bill of Sale, Bill of Lading
Calculating and paying customs duties — amount depends on vehicle type, year and engine size
Registration and license plates — the final step, after which the car is fully yours
customs.costsIntro: The customs duty depends on three factors: vehicle type, model year and engine displacement. In addition, fixed service fees apply:
notes: Vehicles must meet the Euro 5 standard (generally 2013+) for registration in Georgia
Right-hand-drive vehicles are subject to a triple excise rate
Electric and hybrid vehicles enjoy reduced customs duties
Classic cars older than 40 years are exempt from certain requirements
benefits: Hundreds of US and Canadian vehicles cleared through customs
Transparent duty calculation — you know the total before the process starts
Processing from 1 business day — no unnecessary delays
Full support: from inspection to license plates
We operate in all major Georgian cities

delivery.title: Car Delivery from USA and Canada to Georgia
delivery.subtitle: End-to-end logistics: from American auction to your city in Georgia.
delivery.intro: We arrange delivery of vehicles from the largest US and Canadian auctions (Copart, IAAI) to the port of Poti and onward to your city. We work with trusted logistics partners and provide tracking at every stage — you always know where your car is.
steps: Auction purchase — we bid on your behalf at Copart and IAAI
Pickup from the auction yard — transport to the consolidation warehouse
Ground shipping to the US departure port (New York, Florida, California or other)
Container loading and ocean freight to the port of Poti (Georgia)
Unloading, customs clearance and delivery to your city
delivery.routesIntro: Delivery time depends on the US departure port:
routes: East Coast (New York, New Jersey) — 60–75 days
includes: Ground transport to the departure port
Ocean freight to the port of Poti
Unloading at the port of Poti
benefits: Working with trusted international logistics companies
Average delivery time: 45–60 days from purchase to handover
Online status tracking at every stage
Cargo insurance throughout the entire route
Delivery to any Georgian city: Tbilisi, Batumi, Kutaisi and more

tracking.subtitle: Enter a VIN to see real-time logistics checkpoints and status updates.
tracking.notFound: No tracking events found for this VIN.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Send a request and we'll get back to you quickly. Feel free to mention a specific lot number or model.
contacts.note: We accept requests in Georgian, Russian and English.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Auto Market — trusted vehicle importer with 10+ years of experience and offices across Georgia.
about.intro: We help clients buy vehicles directly from US auctions at the best prices. Our team handles everything — from finding the right car to delivery and customs clearance in Georgia.
whyItems: Direct access to Copart and IAAI auctions
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Full support: purchase, delivery, customs clearance
howSteps: You choose a vehicle from our catalog or tell us your desired model
We check the history, condition and calculate the full cost
After confirmation, we bid at auction on your behalf
We organize delivery and customs clearance
You receive the vehicle with a complete document package

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Auto Market (‘we’, ‘us’, ‘company’) is the data controller for personal data collected on this website. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use and protect it, and your rights as a data subject. By using the site and submitting enquiries, you agree to the terms of this Policy.
privacy.s2Body: We collect only data that you voluntarily provide when completing forms on the site:
s2Items: Lot number or VIN (if included in your enquiry)
Technical data: IP address and browser type — for security and abuse-prevention purposes only
privacy.s3Body: We process your personal data on the following legal grounds:
s3Items: Consent — you explicitly tick the consent checkbox before submitting a form
Performance of a contract or pre-contractual steps — to process your enquiry and prepare a quote
Legitimate interests — protecting against abuse and ensuring the security of the website
privacy.s4Body: Your data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
s4Items: Responding to your enquiry by phone or messenger
Calculating the cost of the vehicle, logistics, and customs fees
Confirming lot availability and arranging the transaction
Internal enquiry tracking in the company’s CRM system
privacy.s5Body: Your data is stored on secure servers with restricted access. Only staff directly involved in processing enquiries have access to your data. We apply technical and organisational security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS), access controls, and regular security audits. Data is retained no longer than necessary to fulfil the stated purposes — generally no more than 3 years from the date of last contact.
privacy.s6Body: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Limited access may be granted only to:
s6Items: Technical service providers (hosting, CRM, email services) — solely to support service delivery, bound by confidentiality obligations
Government authorities — only upon a lawful request under applicable legislation
privacy.s7Body: Under applicable data protection law, you have the right to:
s7Items: Obtain confirmation that your data is being processed and receive a copy (right of access)
Correct inaccurate or outdated data (right to rectification)
Request deletion of your data (right to erasure / right to be forgotten)
Restrict or object to the processing of your data
Withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal
Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
privacy.s8Body: Our website uses cookies. Full information about the types of cookies we use, their purposes, and how to manage them is set out in our Cookie Policy, available in the site footer.
privacy.s9Body: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy. The current version is always available on this page. For material changes we will post a notice on the site. Continued use of the site after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.
privacy.s10Body: For any questions related to the processing of your personal data — including requests to access, correct, or delete your data — please contact us via the Contacts section of our website. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe in accordance with applicable law.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that a website stores in your browser when you visit. They allow the site to function correctly, remember your settings, and maintain security. Cookies do not contain personal data and cannot execute code.
cookies.s2Body: We use only technically necessary cookies. We do not use analytics, advertising, or marketing cookies without your explicit consent. The site uses the following categories of cookies:
s2Items: Session cookies — ensure correct navigation and form functionality. Automatically deleted when you close your browser.
Authentication cookies — used exclusively in the admin panel when an administrator signs in. Not set for regular users.
Security cookies (CSRF tokens) — protect contact forms against cross-site request forgery attacks.
cookies.s3Body: The following cookies may be set on this site:
s3Items: next-auth.session-token — admin authentication; session cookie; HttpOnly, Secure flags; not accessible via JavaScript
__Host-next-auth.csrf-token — CSRF attack prevention; session cookie; HttpOnly, Secure flags
NEXT_LOCALE — stores your preferred interface language; 1-year expiry; Secure
cookies.s4Body: Our site does not integrate third-party analytics services (Google Analytics, etc.) and does not place advertising trackers. If we introduce third-party services that require cookies in the future, we will update this policy and request your explicit consent in accordance with applicable law.
cookies.s5Body: You can manage cookies and withdraw consent at any time through your browser settings:
s5Items: Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
Mozilla Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
Microsoft Edge: Settings → Privacy, search and services → Cookies and site permissions
cookies.s6Body: We may update this Cookie Policy as technologies or legal requirements change. The current version is always available on this page. The date of the last update is shown at the top of the page.
